message:
feat(core): add dependency-aware swarm work queue with anti-starvation fairness (ft-3681t.3.3)

Implement SwarmWorkQueue backed by a DAG dependency graph: agents pull only
ready/unblocked items, with explicit ownership transitions, heartbeat-based
staleness reclaim, configurable retry limits, anti-starvation priority boost,
and checkpoint/restore for restart safety. Includes 29 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
